hero.title: We Are Waiting for You
hero.subtitle: Two kilometres from the beach, in the heart of the Parque Natural do Sudoeste Alentejano.
hero.imageAlt: Monte do Papa Léguas exterior at dusk

address.name: Monte do Papa Léguas
address.description: Surrounded by farmland and set within a small private pine grove, we are located 2 km from the centre of Zambujeira do Mar and its beach.
address.nearbyBeaches: Nearest beaches: Zambujeira do Mar, Alteirinhos, Carvalhal and Almograve
